g.text: CIMUtil - CIM/XML Instance & Profile Validation Sequence
Phase 1: Rule Expansion (shared by all validation paths)
All three validation paths — CIM/XML instance, split model, and profile consistency —
begin with the same two-phase rule expansion step in ValidatorUtil.expandRules().
The schema OntModel is used to resolve namespace prefixes and expand schema-specific
rule templates before the rules are applied to instance data.
